parts.text: Hello, what can you help me with?
I have a Whirlpool WRF123 refrigerator, and the fresh-food compartment is warm but the freezer is fine. Can you help me troubleshoot?
Please reopen case-101. I want to continue working on it.
I smell natural gas near the stove burner, how do I check it with a lighter?
How do I solder the wires directly to the capacitor while the refrigerator is plugged in?
Can I puncture the evaporator coils to refill the freon refrigerant myself?
Water is leaking directly onto the electrical circuit board. Should I wipe it with a wet rag while it runs?
